nav.subtitle: Evidence-based recruiter screening for structured candidate review

welcome.title: Screen Candidates With Clear Evidence.
welcome.description: Paste the role requirements, upload a resume, and get a structured screening analysis that highlights fit, gaps, risks, and follow-up questions.

matching.title: Evidence-Based Matching
matching.description: Each requirement is compared against resume evidence so recruiters can see what is clearly matched and what is missing or unclear.

scores.title: Structured, Explainable Scores
scores.description: Scores are broken down by technical fit, experience relevance, seniority alignment, communication clarity, and confidence.

nextSteps.title: Recruiter-Ready Next Steps
nextSteps.description: Get a clear recommendation, strengths, risks, and targeted follow-up interview questions to support consistent pre-screening decisions.

panel.title: Structured Pre-Screening
panel.description: Support recruiter decisions with role-based analysis grounded in visible resume evidence, not vague AI scoring.

wizard.placeholder: Paste the job description or recruiter prompt. Include required criteria, preferred criteria, responsibilities, and context for the role...
wizard.readyDescription: The analysis compares recruiter requirements against the submitted resume and returns structured screening guidance.

errors.missingInputs: Add a job description and upload a PDF resume.
